cards.title: Curatorial Planning
cards.description: Concept definition, thematic research, artist selection, and the development of coherent exhibition narratives. Each project is approached with critical depth, ensuring an articulate artistic vision from inception to opening night.

cards.title: Exhibition Production
cards.description: Full organizational oversight of exhibition logistics, installation planning, and production management. From venue coordination to technical requirements, every operational detail is handled with precision and professional care.

cards.title: Art Management
cards.description: Strategic support for artists in the development, positioning, and communication of their professional practice — helping build a coherent public profile, define artistic identity, and navigate the contemporary art world with confidence.

cards.title: Digital Curation
cards.description: International collaborations connecting contemporary art with digital strategy and online representation. Creation of bespoke artist websites that translate each artistic vision into a refined, coherent, and lasting digital presence.
